song.title: I Need Thee Every Hour
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I need Thee every hour, Most gracious Lord; No tender voice like Thine Can peace afford.
[C] Chorus I need Thee, Oh, I need Thee; Every hour I need Thee; Oh, bless me now, my Savior! I come to Thee.
[V2] 2) I need Thee every hour, Stay Thou near by; Temptations lose their pow’r When Thou art nigh.
[V3] 3) I need Thee every hour, In joy or pain; Come quickly and abide, Or life is vain.
[V4] 4) I need Thee every hour, Teach me Thy will; And Thy rich promises In me fulfill.
[V5] 5) I need Thee every hour, Most Holy One; Oh, make me Thine indeed, Thou blesséd Son.
song.author: Annie S. Hawks
